summary: Iteration 6 smoke testing of Payroll Report, Bulk Reassign (drag/drop), and Inventory module completed. All 3 modules pass backend + frontend basic flows.
passed: Backend GET /api/reports/payroll returns rows with worker Ajay, total_pairs=110, total_earning=1980, grand_total, worker_count, from/to dates
Backend POST /api/production/bulk-assign with 3 job_ids + role=cutting + worker=Ajay returned {affected:3, role, worker_id, worker_name} as expected
Backend GET /api/inventory lists all 12 materials with balance=0 when empty; updated row shows stock_in=50, stock_out=10, adjustments=-5, balance=35, value=10500 after movements
Backend POST /api/inventory/movements type=in creates movement; subsequent inventory shows last_purchase_rate=300, last_purchase_date=2026-02-15
Backend POST /api/inventory/movements type=out decreases balance; type=adjustment with negative qty (-5) goes into adjustments column
Backend POST /api/inventory/shortage with BOM job returns shortage=12.24 mtr, purchase_cost_estimated=3549.6 (max(0, required-in_stock) verified)
Frontend login + sidebar shows Inventory and Payroll nav entries (admin role)

Frontend /inventory page renders 3 KPI tiles (Materials=12, Stock Value=₹10,500, Out of Stock=11), search/category filters, table with In/Out/Adj/Balance/Value columns, Stock In/Consume/Adjustment action buttons present

Frontend /payroll page renders 2 date inputs (From/To), Run button, 3 KPI tiles (Karigars Earning=2, Total Payout=₹3,780, Period), karigar table with Ajay rows showing rate/pair, total pairs, earnings

Frontend /production page has 'Karigars' button top-right; clicking opens horizontal dock at bottom with hint 'Drag a karigar onto any stage column to assign them across all cards in that column' and 2 draggable Ajay chips; 9 column headers detected
notes: Drag-and-drop simulation not executed in headless (per request fallback acceptable); bulk-assign API verified directly. ESLint warning in Payroll.jsx (missing useEffect dep 'load') is non-blocking.
